name: /compliance-remove: appends an audit log entry recording the removal to compliance/audit.jsonl (per C-4)
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro compliance && printf -- '- id: nist-ai-rmf
  name: NIST AI RMF
  url: https://nist.gov
  authoritative_publisher: NIST
  jurisdiction: us-government
  applicable_to: [ai]
  identifier_scheme: nist
  why_authoritative: |
    a
    b
    c
  fetch_frequency: weekly
  legal_review_required: false
  paywalled: false
' > .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-remove.sh" nist-ai-rmf --catalog "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml" --audit-log "$PWD/compliance/audit.jsonl" --force && grep "compliance-remove" compliance/audit.jsonl 1>&2 && grep "nist-ai-rmf" compliance/audit.jsonl 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
